name: Markdown Preview
description: Live preview and rendering for Markdown files with full GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) support including tables, syntax highlighting, task lists, and strikethrough formatting
author: Voiden Team

actions.name: Preview Markdown
actions.description: Opens markdown preview in read-only Voiden tab with panel toggle

editorActions.description: Registers preview button for markdown files in code editor toolbar

features: Live markdown preview in read-only Voiden tab
GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) support
Tables with proper cell formatting
Strikethrough text formatting
Task lists and checkboxes
Inline and reference-style links
Inline and reference-style images
YAML frontmatter support
Custom YAML blocks (cube blocks)
Proper blank line preservation
Toggle preview panel visibility
Self-contained markdown parser (unified/remark)
Automatic heading IDs
Blockquotes
Ordered and unordered lists
Inline code and code blocks with syntax highlighting

name: OpenAPI Collection Importer
description: Seamlessly migrate from OpenAPI by importing v3.0 collections and converting them to native Voiden request files with full support for nested folders, environment variables, headers, auth, and all request body types
author: Voiden Team

buttons.description: Opens file picker to select and import OpenAPI v3.0 JSON collections

ui.description: Adds import button to left sidebar for easy collection import

fileSystem.description: Creates folder structure and .void files from OpenAPI collection hierarchy

dependencies.reason: Uses voiden-rest-api helpers to generate compatible REST API blocks

integration.description: Depends on voiden-rest-api extension for REST block generation

features: Import OpenAPI Collection v3.0 JSON files
Automatically create folder structure matching collection hierarchy
Convert selected requests to a native .void file
Preserve request names and folder organization
Support for all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)
Import request headers and convert to headers-table blocks
Import query parameters and convert to query-table blocks
Import JSON request bodies and convert to json_body blocks
Import form-data bodies and convert to multipart-table blocks
Import URL-encoded bodies
Sanitize file and folder names for filesystem compatibility
Progress tracking during import
Batch file creation with throttling to prevent system overload
Uses voiden-rest-api helpers for consistent block generation
Generates markdown with proper YAML frontmatter
Nested folder support (unlimited depth)
Handles special characters in names

name: Postman Collection Importer
description: Seamlessly migrate from Postman by importing v2.1 collections and automatically converting them to native Voiden request files with full support for nested folders, environment variables, headers, auth, and all request body types
author: Voiden Team

buttons.description: Opens file picker to select and import Postman v2.1 JSON collections

ui.description: Adds import button to left sidebar for easy collection import

fileSystem.description: Creates folder structure and .void files from Postman collection hierarchy

dependencies.reason: Uses voiden-rest-api helpers to generate compatible REST API blocks

integration.description: Depends on voiden-rest-api extension for REST block generation

features: Import Postman Collection v2.1 JSON files
Automatically create folder structure matching collection hierarchy
Convert each request to a native .void file
Preserve request names and folder organization
Support for all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)
Import request headers and convert to headers-table blocks
Import query parameters and convert to query-table blocks
Import JSON request bodies and convert to json_body blocks
Import form-data bodies and convert to multipart-table blocks
Import URL-encoded bodies
Sanitize file and folder names for filesystem compatibility
Progress tracking during import
Batch file creation with throttling to prevent system overload
Uses voiden-rest-api helpers for consistent block generation
Generates markdown with proper YAML frontmatter
Nested folder support (unlimited depth)
Handles special characters in names
Converts Postman's raw mode to appropriate body types

name: Simple Assertions
description: Add simple assertion testing to your HTTP requests with an easy-to-use table interface
author: Voiden Team
features: Two-column assertion table for writing tests
Support for JSONPath, XPath, and form field assertions
Multiple assertion operators (equals, contains, exists, matches, etc.)
Assertion results displayed as sub-panel in response
Color-coded pass/fail indicators

name: Advanced Authentication
description: Advanced authentication support for HTTP/REST APIs including Bearer Token, Basic Auth, API Key, OAuth 1.0/2.0, Digest, AWS Signature, and more
author: Voiden Team

blocks.description: Owns 1 block type for authentication configuration

features: Bearer Token authentication
Basic authentication (username/password)
API Key authentication (header or query parameter)
OAuth 2.0 with customizable token types
OAuth 1.0 with signature generation
Digest authentication
AWS Signature v4
NTLM, Hawk, Atlassian ASAP, Netrc support
Environment variable substitution in auth values
Inherit authentication from parent collections
Quick auth type switching via dropdown

name: Voiden Faker
description: Generate fake data using Faker.js in your API requests
author: Voiden Team

name: Voiden GraphQL
description: GraphQL client with schema importer for building queries through a dedicated UI or editing manually. Supports queries, mutations, subscriptions with variables. Builds its own requests with auto-generated headers and POST method
author: Voiden Team

blocks.description: Owns 2 block types for GraphQL query and variables

requestPipeline.description: Registers handlers for building GraphQL requests, processing responses, and managing subscriptions

features: Schema file importer - load .graphql/.gql schema files
Visual query builder UI with operation and field selection
Field-level argument selection with automatic variable generation
Separate query and variables blocks
Operation type support (query/mutation/subscription)
Variable editor with JSON validation
Standalone request building with auto-generated Content-Type and POST method
Schema viewer with tabs for Query/Mutation/Subscription operations
Auto-generation of queries from UI selections

name: Voiden REST API
description: HTTP/REST API testing toolkit with extensible request pipeline, custom blocks for headers/body, environment variables, response visualization, and support for all HTTP methods including multipart file uploads
author: Voiden Team

blocks.description: Owns 14 block types for HTTP request/response building and visualization

patterns.name: cURL
patterns.description: Parses cURL commands and populates editor with request details
patterns.handles: Complete cURL command parsing including headers, auth, query params, and body

blockHandlers.description: Strips formatting from pasted content, inserts as plain text
Strips formatting from pasted content, inserts as plain text

requestPipeline.description: Registers handlers for building requests and processing responses

history.description: Registers a REST-aware cURL builder for history entries. Other plugins can do the same via context.history.registerCurlBuilder().

features: HTTP method selection (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)
URL building with path parameters and query strings
Headers management with autocomplete
Multiple body types: JSON, XML, YAML, HTML, form-data, URL-encoded, multipart
File uploads via multipart/form-data
Environment variable substitution
cURL import via paste
Response visualization with status, headers, and body
Collapsible response sections
Syntax highlighting for JSON and XML responses
Request/response pipeline integration
History API integration: custom cURL builder for global history export

name: Voiden Scripting
description: Pre-request and post-response JavaScript scripting for API requests with vd API access
author: Voiden Team
features: Pre-request JavaScript scripts (runs before request is sent)
Post-response JavaScript scripts (runs after response is received)
voiden.request API for reading/writing request data
voiden.response API for reading response data
voiden.env.get for active environment variable access
voiden.variables.get/set for Voiden runtime variable access
Request body should be string payload (stringify JSON/object values before sending)
voiden.log() for script output logging
voiden.assert(condition, message) for script-based assertions
voiden.cancel() to cancel request from pre-script
CodeMirror JavaScript editor with syntax highlighting

name: Sockets & gRPC APIs
description: Voiden Sockets provide comprehensive support for WebSocket (WSS) and gRPC communication with unary, server streaming, client streaming, and bidirectional streaming patterns
author: Voiden Team

blocks.description: Owns 6 block types for WebSocket and gRPC socket connections

requestPipeline.description: Registers handlers for building requests, processing streaming connections, and managing bidirectional communication

patterns.name: websocat
patterns.description: Parses websocat commands and populates editor with WebSocket connection details
patterns.handles: WebSocket URL parsing including headers, protocols, and connection options

patterns.name: grpcurl
patterns.description: Parses grpcurl commands and populates editor with gRPC request details
patterns.handles: gRPC service parsing including proto files, metadata, request body, and service endpoints

blockHandlers.description: Strips formatting from pasted content, inserts as plain text
Strips formatting from pasted content, inserts as plain text
Strips formatting from pasted content, inserts services and method

features: Real-time message streaming
Bidirectional communication log
Connection status indicator
Message history viewer
responsePanel.description: Dedicated response panel for monitoring WebSocket and gRPC communication between Voiden and server

history.description: Registers socket-aware command builders for history entries: websocat for WS/WSS, grpcurl for GRPC/GRPCS.

protoFiles.description: Parse and import Protocol Buffer definition files for gRPC service discovery

features: WebSocket (WSS) connection support
gRPC with unary, server streaming, client streaming, and bidirectional streaming patterns
Proto file import and parsing
Dynamic service and method selection from proto files
Real-time message exchange
Connection state management
Message history and logging
Dedicated response panel for socket communication
Support for multiple concurrent connections
History API integration: websocat/grpcurl command builder for global history export

name: Voiden Stitch
description: Batch-run multiple .void files as a stitch with aggregated assertion results, variable isolation, and sequential execution
author: Voiden Team
features: Batch run multiple .void files sequentially
Glob pattern matching for file inclusion/exclusion
Shared or isolated variable scope per file
Aggregated assertion results in dedicated sidebar tab
Per-file pass/fail with assertion counts and timing
Stop-on-failure option
Configurable delay between files
Abort/cancel support
Export results to styled Excel report with per-file sheets, assertion breakdowns, and pass/fail percentages

name: ApyHub Explorer
description: Browse, search, and integrate ApyHub APIs directly from Voiden.
author: ApyHub

name: Theme Creator
description: Create, edit, and live-preview custom color themes for Voiden — all without leaving the app.
author: Phurpa Tsering

name: Blueprints
description: Save and reuse common API request structures as blueprints. Insert them anywhere with a slash command.
author: Parv Bajaj

name: Type Generator
description: Generate strongly-typed models from API responses. Supports TypeScript, Dart, Go, Kotlin, Swift, and Java via quicktype — live preview with copy to clipboard.
author: Parv Bajaj

name: Insomnia Collection Importer
description: Import Insomnia v4 collection exports (.json) into Voiden — preserves folder structure, headers, query params, request bodies, and authentication.
author: Phurpa Tsering
readme: Import Insomnia v4 collection exports (.json) into Voiden — preserves folder structure, headers, query params, request bodies, and authentication.
